statement: In every magma, Equation 2213 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * y)`) implies Equation 3360 (`x * y = y * (y * (z * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0065
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op y (op z z)))
